texto: Too many women throw themselves into romance because they're afraid of being single, then start making compromises and losing their identity. I won't do that.
explicacao: Citação de Julie Delpy sobre temas ligados a amor. “Too many women throw themselves into romance because they're afraid of being single, then start m…” articula amor, women, identity em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como identity e losing.

frase_original: Too many women throw themselves into romance because they're afraid of being single, then start making compromises and losing their identity. I won't do that.

texto: I believe if there's any kind of God it wouldn't be in any of us, not you or me but just this little space in between. If there's any kind of magic in this world it must be in the attempt of understanding someone sharing something. I know, it's almost impossible to succeed but who cares really? The answer must be in the attempt.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Julie Delpy que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “I believe if there's any kind of God it wouldn't be in any of us, not you or me but just this lit…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, god, share, com foco em share e world.
